The '''Model 6 "Quick-6"''', commonly referred to as the '''"Quick-6"''', was a [[Sporting blaster/Legends|sporting blaster]] pistol manufactured by [[Merr-Sonn Munitions, Inc./Legends|Merr-Sonn Munitions, Inc.]] during the time of the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]]. Though the Quick-6's bolt was slightly less powerful than that of most sporting blaster pistols, its [[Stun/Legends|stun]] setting was much more effective than most weapons in its class—a feature that [[Big game hunter/Legends|live-game hunters]] used to their advantage. The Quick-6 was also lighter than most comparable weapons, though this trait also made the weapon slightly more delicate.

{{Weapon-stub}}

==Behind the scenes==
This blaster resembles the real-world [http://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Mauser_C96 Mauser C96 pistol], in common with the Merr-Sonn [[Model 44 blaster pistol|Model 44]] and [[Power 5 heavy blaster pistol|Power 5]] blaster pistols and [[BlasTech Industries/Legends|BlasTech's]] [[DL-44 heavy blaster pistol/Legends|DL-44 heavy blaster pistol]] which were all built using a C96.
